title: Subitems in Outlook Calendar Integration

posts.author: djb85 (Derek Byrne)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We have synced a subitems Date Column to Outlook but as you can see, all items are preceded with “Subitems of ‘board name’”.

Is there any way we can just see the detail of the line item and not show “Subitems of ‘board name’” in Outlook calendar?

posts.author: ABarros (Antonio Barros)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same question, the way it works now is not practical at all.
